# smc_initial_contact (Action)

Action for initial contact configuration for a firewall node.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `initial_contact_href` (String) href of the initial contact endpoint.
- `output_file` (String) Path to save the base64 encoded configuration file locally.

### Optional

- `enable_ssh` (Boolean) Enable SSH access on the firewall node.
- `export_to_base64` (Boolean) Export the configuration as base64 encoded string.
- `install_on_server` (Boolean) Whether to install on the server.
- `keyboard` (String) The keyboard layout to configure on the firewall node.
- `root_password` (String) The root password for the firewall node.
- `time_zone` (String) The time zone to configure on the firewall node.
